fields.description: Which guest routing endpoint was called (register, deregister, check_label, ...).
fields.label: Endpoint

fields.description: The outcome (ok / taken / reserved / at_limit / invalid / unresolved).
fields.label: Status

fields.description: 1 when the call was rejected by a business rule (as opposed to accepted).
fields.label: Business Reject

fields.description: The label or domain the call carried (blank for list / host-level queries).
fields.label: Label

fields.description: The resolved VM (a Data snapshot, not a Link — an audit row must outlive the VM). Blank when the source resolved to no VM (a spoof/ambiguity signal).
fields.label: VM

fields.description: The request source address caller resolution acted on (frappe.local.request_ip).
fields.label: Source IP

fields.description: The forwarded-header chain verbatim (incl. raw X-Forwarded-For). Its divergence from source_ip is the leftmost-XFF forgery signal.
fields.label: Forwarded Headers
